visits.title: Initial Comprehensive Exam
visits.description: Welcome visit! Full comprehensive exam with Dr. Brenes. Intraoral photos, medical history review. Initial assessment: overall dental health good with some areas needing attention. Patient interested in digital dentistry approach.

visits.title: Full Mouth X-Rays & 3D Scan
visits.description: Full mouth X-ray series and Medit i-700 digital scan. AI analysis identified hairline fracture line on tooth #30 (ML cusp, 82% confidence). Crown #14 area shows prior restoration failing. Treatment plan updated.

visits.title: Crown Preparation — Tooth #14
visits.description: Prepared upper left first molar for zirconia crown. Digital impression taken with Medit i-700 — no messy trays needed. Temporary crown placed. Lab fabrication: 2 weeks. Patient comfortable throughout procedure.

visits.title: Crown Delivery — Tooth #14
visits.description: Permanent BruxZir zirconia crown cemented on tooth #14. Perfect fit confirmed by digital scan overlay — less than 50-micron marginal gap. Occlusion adjusted and verified. Patient very happy with natural color match.

visits.title: Cleaning & AI Diagnostic Scan
visits.description: Routine prophylaxis and full AI diagnostic scan. Crown #14 showing excellent integration — margins sealed, no recurrent decay. Tooth #30 fracture stable — no progression since January. Mild calculus on lower anteriors cleaned. Gum health: good. Next visit: September 2026.

visits.title: Periodontal Maintenance & Review
visits.description: Scheduled routine cleaning and 6-month check-up. AI scan will reassess tooth #30 fracture progression. Night guard consult if patient is ready.
